name: @jwcode/cli
description: JWCode — Java AI Coding Tool TypeScript CLI

scripts.version: node -e "const f=require('fs');const v=require('./package.json').version;let l=f.readFileSync('./package-lock.json','utf8');l=l.replace(/\"version\":\s*\"[^\"]+\"/g,(m)=>m.replace(/\"[^\"]+\"$/,`\"${v}\"`));f.writeFileSync('./package-lock.json',l)" && git add package-lock.json
scripts.postversion: git push origin main --follow-tags && git push origin v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
